name: Tides of Meridion

abilities.name: Submerged
abilities.text: After succeeding in an attack action targeting an enemy model, this model may remove a Drift token from itself to place the target anywhere within 5" of its current location in base contact with a Tide marker.

abilities.name: Strong Current
abilities.text: After this model resolves the Walk or Charge action, it may discard a card or drain a (t) to make a Tide marker within 3".

actions.name: Oh No! Ogopogo!
actions.effects: Enemy models within (missile)2" of the target must pass a TN 13 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Low Tide
triggers.text: Enemies within range of the (missile) gain a Staggered token.

extraction_notes: Tide markers are referenced throughout but not explicitly defined on this crew card
Drift tokens are referenced in Submerged ability but not defined on this crew card
